name: Choice Athletics
about: Choice Athletics is an indoor training facility that provides year-round private baseball and softball lessons alongside golf simulator access. The facility offers personalized coaching for athletes looking to improve their skills in both sports, with instructors utilizing technology such as HitTrax, Blast Motion, and ArmCare. Golfers can reserve time on HD Golf simulators, with various membership packages available that include a set number of 30-minute reservations per month. The venue operates with a structured approach to training, focusing on individualized attention and development in both sports disciplines.
why_golfers_like_it: HD Golf simulator technology for realistic gameplay
Multiple membership tiers to fit different usage needs
Ability to host private events and parties in the simulator room
House clubs and simulator game accessories provided
Multi-sport facility offering diverse athletic options

simulator_hardware.notes: Full simulator package with house clubs and accessories

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, house clubs are available if needed. We provide all simulator game accessories.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drink to the facility?
faq.answer: Food or drinks are not permitted on any turf areas, including but not limited to gum and sunflower seeds.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Each golf simulator reservation is typically 30 minutes in length, with different membership packages offering varying numbers of reservations per month.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, an adult or coach is required to accompany anyone under the age of 14. The facility also offers junior-focused golf simulator memberships and baseball/softball training for youth.
